objective: Review the plan for CART-S03-T01: implementing carto rm command to delete a node and its edges
key_changes: removeNode() signature (returns {node, edgeCount} | null) correctly satisfies all 8 acceptance criteria
Cascading edge delete (from === node.id || to === node.id) is correct for directed edges
load → filter → save pattern matches existing addNode/link — architecture aligned
Pure-function separation preserved: removeNode in graph.ts, I/O in cli.ts
chalk.green/chalk.red + console.error + process.exit(1) matches existing CLI patterns
No data model changes — existing Node/Edge/Graph types are sufficient
Three test cases cover not-found, orphan node, and cascade — adequate coverage
